title: OpenAI Academy adds courses for practical AI workflows and agents at work
friendlyTitle: OpenAI adds work-focused AI training courses
summary: OpenAI introduced three Academy courses: AI Foundations, Applied AI Foundations, and Agents and Workflows. The curriculum is designed to help employees move from basic prompting to repeatable AI workflows, agent direction, boundaries, checkpoints, and human review.
friendlySummary: OpenAI Academy now has courses that teach people how to use AI in everyday work, build repeatable workflows, and guide agents with clearer instructions and review steps.
whyItMatters: The bottleneck in workplace AI is often not access to a model, but knowing how to turn it into safe, repeatable habits. Structured training around agents and workflows gives teams a more realistic adoption path than asking everyone to improvise with chat prompts.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This is useful because many workers have AI access but little structure. Training people on workflows and oversight can make AI more helpful and less chaotic.
